_meta.description: D6 fixtures for mastra / gen-ui-interrupt. Mastra uses suspend/resume (not LangGraph interrupt()) — the aimock fixture sits at the LLM layer and emits schedule_meeting tool calls which the Mastra adapter translates into tool-call-suspended AG-UI events.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-interrupt sales-call pill — first leg: schedule_meeting tool call. The Mastra adapter translates this into a tool-call-suspended event, surfacing the time-picker UI inline via useInterrupt.

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Sure — let me check available times.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-interrupt sales-call pill — cancelled leg (user denied). Cancel resumes with the SAME toolCallId as pick; only the tool-result payload differs, so gate on toolResultContains (aimock ≥ 1.37.0) and keep this leg BEFORE the confirmation leg (first match wins).

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Denied — the sales intro call was not booked because no time slot was selected.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-interrupt sales-call pill — second leg: confirmation after user picks a slot and resume fires.

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Booked: Sales intro call confirmed for the slot you picked.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-interrupt alice-1on1 pill — first leg: schedule_meeting tool call.

response.content: Got it — pulling up next-week slots.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-interrupt alice-1on1 pill — cancelled leg. Same toolCallId as the pick path; discriminated by the tool-result payload via toolResultContains, ordered before the confirmation leg.

response.content: Denied — the 1:1 with Alice was not scheduled because no time slot was selected.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-interrupt alice-1on1 pill — second leg: confirmation after slot picked.

response.content: Scheduled: 1:1 with Alice locked in for the slot you picked.
